name: Creamed Spinachy Macarena
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Crema Mexicana or heavy cream
8 oz Queso crema or cream cheese, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place spinach and water in a stockpot over medium-high heat. Cover and cook until wilted, about 6 minutes.
2. Transfer spinach to a colander. With the back of a large spoon, press out as much liquid as possible.
3. When cool, chop drained spinach.
4. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add Crema Mexicana, Queso crema, chili powder, nutmeg, sugar, and lime zest. Cook, stirring until cheese melts.
6. Add chopped spinach and toss.
7. Preheat broiler to 550°F.
8. Spoon spinach mixture into a buttered casserole dish.
9. Pour melted butter over bread crumbs in a small dish and stir to coat.
10. Sprinkle bread crumbs over spinach, then top with paprika.
11. Broil until bread crumbs have browned and spinach mixture is hot and bubbling, about 1 minute.
